kicker.zh: 工作流 shell 与运行时

summary.en: An OpenClaw workflow engine for running multi-step tool pipelines with approvals, resume tokens, and stronger auditability.
summary.zh: OpenClaw 生态里的工作流执行引擎，用来把多步工具流水线做成可审批、可恢复、可审计的执行过程。

en: Lobster is one of the most practical OpenClaw ecosystem tools because it turns risky or complex agent actions into explicit workflows. Instead of letting an agent improvise every shell command one by one, Lobster packages a sequence of steps into a resumable pipeline with approval checkpoints and predictable execution boundaries.

That matters any time you want an agent to do real work but still keep humans in the loop. Public docs position it as a shell and runtime that supports JSON or DSL-based pipelines, timeouts, output limits, approval breaks, and resume tokens. The result is a cleaner split between planning and execution, especially when paired with OpenProse or other orchestration layers.
zh: Lobster 是 OpenClaw 生态里很实用的一类工具，因为它把高风险或复杂的 agent 行为收进了明确的工作流里。与其让 agent 临场一条条执行 shell 命令，不如把多步操作打包成一个可恢复的流水线，并在关键节点加入审批和更清楚的执行边界。
这对“既想让 agent 干活，又想保留人工把关”的场景特别重要。公开文档把它定位为一个 shell 和运行时，支持 JSON 或 DSL 形式的 pipeline、超时、输出限制、审批打断和 resume token。它很适合和 OpenProse 这类编排层配合，把规划和执行明确分开。

en: Supports multi-step pipelines with built-in approval checkpoints.
Designed around resumable, auditable execution rather than ad hoc tool calls.
Fits well when OpenClaw agents need stronger control over side effects.
zh: 支持多步流水线和内置审批节点。
重点是可恢复、可审计的执行，而不是临时拼接工具调用。
很适合需要更严格副作用控制的 OpenClaw agent 场景。
